MockLayout.title: MockLayout
MockLayout.description: Karl CMS Page template layout used for rapid web layout generation and approval.

pageName.description: Name of the mock page blueprint.

taskGoal.description: One clear civic task goal that this page serves.

components.description: The ordered list of Karl CMS components structured on the page.

BrandGuideline.description: Official brand standard or WCAG 2.1 AA checklist item.

section.description: The header section of the guideline manual.

content.description: Detailed text content of the brand standards.

users/{userId}/layouts/{layoutId}.description: Saved mock page layouts created by the specific user.

users/{userId}/guidelines/{guidelineId}.description: Custom or overridden brand manual guidelines edited by the specific user.
